seoTitle: How to Access Cloudflare Zero Trust & Use ZTNA
metaDescription: Learn what Zero Trust Network Access is, how it replaces traditional VPNs, and how to set up your free Cloudflare Zero Trust workspace step by step.
intro: Zero Trust Network Access verifies every connection request individually instead of trusting anyone who's already inside a traditional corporate VPN, closing off a common path for lateral attacks. This guide explains what ZTNA means in practice and walks through setting up your Cloudflare Zero Trust workspace, including registering a team domain and activating the free tier.

steps.heading: Understand what Zero Trust replaces
steps.body: Traditional VPNs grant broad network access once you're connected; Zero Trust Network Access instead checks every request against policy, reducing the risk of one compromised device exposing everything.

steps.heading: Open the Zero Trust section in Cloudflare
steps.body: From your main Cloudflare dashboard, find the Zero Trust option under the account's protect-and-connect area.

steps.heading: Register your team domain
steps.body: Choose a custom, unique subdomain name that will serve as your organization's Zero Trust authentication portal.

steps.heading: Select the free plan
steps.body: Walk through the onboarding wizard and choose the free tier, which covers a workspace of up to 50 users.

steps.heading: Verify and activate your account
steps.body: Follow the on-screen prompts to confirm your setup details and authorize account activation.

steps.heading: Launch your Zero Trust dashboard
steps.body: Once activated, open the dashboard to review the Applications, Tunnels, and Access Policy areas where you'll configure who can reach what.

faq.question: Is Cloudflare Zero Trust free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, there's a free tier that supports up to 50 users, which is enough for many small teams to get started.

faq.question: How is Zero Trust different from a VPN?
faq.answer: A VPN grants broad network access once connected; Zero Trust verifies each individual request against policy, so access is limited and continuously checked.

faq.question: Do I need to install anything to use Zero Trust?
faq.answer: Basic setup only requires registering your team domain in the dashboard; connecting specific apps or private networks may require additional tunnel configuration.

faq.question: Can I change my team domain name later?
faq.answer: You should choose it carefully during setup, as changing a team domain after users are onboarded can require reconfiguration.
